headline: How to Invest Now If You Want to Profit from the 2026 World Cup
summary: The FIFA World Cup is going to generate up to $40.9 billion worth of consumer spend, and a lot of companies will see a major boost in revenue. Fortunately, there's still time for investors to cash in on World Cup fever.

headline: Brunswick, Figs, Marriott Vacations, WeightWatchers, and PVH Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after easing pressure in the bond market and a pullback in oil prices boosted investor sentiment for consumer-facing companies.

headline: Carter's, Wolverine Worldwide, and Marriott Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after a trio of major retailers reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter earnings.

headline: Wall Street Breakfast Podcast: Summer Travel Meets FIFA Fever
summary: Memorial Day kicks off summer travel as the FIFA World Cup 2026 hopes to fuel demand for flights, rentals and tourism across North America.
